zh.lifeSummary: Richard IV Earl Gloucs HertsClare DeClare於1222年8月4日出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。他和Maud deLacy至少有1個兒子。他去世於1262年7月15日在紐西蘭坎特布瑞沃爾坦享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard IV Earl Gloucs HertsClare DeClare于1222年8月4日出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾。他和Maud deLacy至少有1个儿子。他去世于1262年7月15日在新西兰坎特布瑞沃爾坦享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: Earl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: North American: from the title originally adopted as a nickname parallel to Duke , King , etc. The title was used in England in Norman times as an equivalent of the French comte ‘count’ it is from Old English eorl ‘warrior, nobleman, prince’. In some cases the given name may have been taken from the surname Earl, which was originally either a nickname or a term denoting someone who worked in the household of an earl.

variants.name: Earle
meanings: North American: from the title originally adopted as a nickname parallel to Duke , King , etc. The title was used in England in Norman times as an equivalent of the French comte ‘count’ it is from Old English eorl ‘warrior, nobleman, prince’. In some cases the given name may have been taken from the surname Earl, which was originally either a nickname or a term denoting someone who worked in the household of an earl.

en.lifeSummary: Richard IV Earl Gloucs HertsClare DeClare was born on 4 August 1222, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son with Maud deLacy. He died on 15 July 1262, in Waltham, Canterbury, New Zealand, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard IV Earl Gloucs HertsClare DeClare est né le 4 août 1222, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Maud deLacy. Il est décédé le 15 juillet 1262, à Waltham, Canterbury, Nouvelle-Zélande, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard IV Earl Gloucs HertsClare DeClare wurde am 4. August 1222 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mit Maud deLacy mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 15. Juli 1262 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Waltham, Canterbury, Neuseeland.

it.lifeSummary: Richard IV Earl Gloucs HertsClare DeClare è nato il il 4 agosto 1222 nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Maud deLacy. Morì il 15 luglio 1262, nel Waltham, Canterbury, Nuova Zelanda, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.Ashenfield Manor, Waltham, Canterbury, N: ニュージーランドカンテルブリーワルサム
ja.lifeSummary: Richard IV Earl Gloucs HertsClare DeClareは1222年8月4日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた。彼はMaud deLacyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1262年7月15日にニュージーランドカンテルブリーワルサムで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard IV Earl Gloucs HertsClare DeClare(은)는 1222년 8월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 태어났다. 그는 Maud deLacy(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1262년 7월 15일 뉴질랜드 캉르버이 월섬에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard IV Earl Gloucs HertsClare DeClare nasceu em 4 de agosto de 1222, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Maud deLacy. Ele faleceu em 15 de julho de 1262, em Waltham, Canterbury, Nova Zelândia, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard IV Earl Gloucs HertsClare DeClare родился 4 августа 1222 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Maud deLacy. Он умер 15 июля 1262 г. в местности валтам, кантирбури, Новая Зеландия в возрасте 39 лет.
